results.title: Employee Reviews about Pay and benefits - spanky's
results.content: Good place to work. Good hours and decent tips. The work can be hard at times. Fast paced during rushes and there are times where it is slow.

results.title: Shapedly - Anyone had any luck resolving order issues?
results.content: I ordered 2 36H bras. I was sent 38H. I emailed customer support and was replied to as if I'd reported not receiving the items at all.
